questions.question:
Which of the following statement/s is/are true about Papa Umanath of Tamil Nadu?
(1) She was the first woman in South India to have been arrested by the British for Salt Sathyagraha.
(2) She organised a Peasant movement in Thuvariman Village.
(3) She became part of the Ponmalai Women's Association.
(4) She joined the Congress Party in 1945.

Which is/are the following facts about Thomas Munroe correct?
(i) He introduced Ryotwari system.
(ii) He donated a big vessel to Tirupathi Tirumala temple.
(iii) He replaced pagoda with rupee.
Speaking bitterly when sweet words prevail, is eating the sour for ripe fruits in the couplet, which of the following human values is stressed for human good relations?
According to Valluvar to whom poverty will be pondered?

Choose the correct matches from the given matches:
(1) Chera King - Vanji-Thondi
(2) Chola King - Madurai-Korkai
(3) Pandiya king - Uraiyur-Poombugar
(4) King Ashoka - Samba Inscription

Match the Sangam books published by U.V.SA. with the years they were published :
(a) Pathupattu
(b) Purananuru
(c) Ingurunuru
(d) Pathitrupathu
1. 1903
2. 1889
3. 1904
4. 1894

People living in BC 6th century were literate. Because,
(1) The pot found at the Keezhadi has Tamizhi scripts engraved on it.
(2) Most of the pots found at the Keezhadi were inscribed with letters after the pot had dried
(3) The black and red coloured pots found in Keezhadi have the image of God engraved on them.
(4) The letter written on the pot were in the same script.

Consider the following statements and find the correct statements.
During Peraringnar Anna's rule, preferences were given to Tamil language. Many steps were taken by him to incorporate Tamil in different fields.
(i) Removed 'Satyameva Jayate' from the Government Motto and incorporated the Tamil words 'Vaimaye Vellum' in it.
(ii) The name board 'Tamilaga Arasu Thalaimai Cheiyalakam' was opened in St. George Fort for the first time.
(iii) Measures were taken to write Thirukkural verses on Tamil Nadu Government buses.

Consider the following statements :
Assertion [A] : Lokmanya Tilak preferred to replace Swaraj and redesigned it as Home Rule
Reason [R] : The British Government was quite allergic to the term Swaraj and considered it seditious.
options: Both [A] and [R] are true, but [R] is not the correct explanation of [A]
Both [A] and [R] are true; and [R] is the correct explanation of [A]

questions.question:
Choose the correctly matched pairs from the following.
(1) Dharmalayam - V.V. Subramaniam
(2) Bharata Mata Sangam - Neelakanta Bramachari
(3) Bharathi Ashramam - V.O. Chidambaram
(4) Swadeshi Steam Navigation Company - Subramania Siva

Arrange the following Governors of Madras Presidency in chronological order.
(1) Lushington
(2) Thomas Munroe
(3) Huge Elliot
(4) George Barlow

The Ramakrishna Mission upholds Vedanta Doctrine
(i) To protect ancient culture of India.
(ii) To develop highest spirituality inherent in man.
(iii) To believe in the truth of Hindu religion only.

Arrange the following events with regard to South Indian Rebellion in chronological order.
(1) Tirunelveli confederacy
(2) Dindugal confederacy
(3) Peninsular confederacy
(4) Regional leagues

Choose the right matches among the following Settlements/Headquarters
(1) Santhome - The Portuguese
(2) Port Nova - The Dutch
(3) Tranquebar - The English
(4) Devanampattinam - The French
